schema_version: v0 — component-charter shape; migrates into the intention envelope when MAP.md Q6 lands
what: The class-space code of the learning store — the mechanism half of cc-learning-store, whose data lives in the sibling CairnCommons/learning/. First rung: gate_view.py, the compiled per-gate projection.
why: Horizon-of-awareness cast into code, not prose (Law 4 — a rule that matters is physics, not policy). A memory that only accumulates cannot be recalled from: it must fold the settled so recall stays bounded as it grows. gate_view is fold-the-settled (Law 1) made executable — raw records (cold/L3) folded by gate into a compiled view (warm/L2) so CC's finite context is spent on the relevant gate, not the corpus.
invoke: gate_view.py [gate]   — no arg: every gate, most-evidence-first; with a gate: that gate's compiled view (sparse recall)
state: building — rung 1 of the staircase (see staircase below). Interim-proven by inspection; tester IOU stands.

staircase.1_fold: DONE (interim) — gate_view.py folds records by gate. Provable by inspection: output is a deterministic fold, no inference.
staircase.2_sparse_recall: DONE (interim) — gate_view.py <gate> surfaces one gate on demand.
staircase.3_structured_ceiling: NEXT — the never-auto-open guardrail becomes a record field, not a prose substring. Surfaced by ci-on-github (closed by physics, but not flagged: its record says 'close hard', not 'ceiling').
staircase.4_tiered_recall: LATER — a recall entrypoint chaining L1 slate -> L2 gate_view -> L3 raw records, escalate-cheapest-first.
staircase.5_sleep_and_gate: DEEP END — importance-weighted nightly consolidation (produces the L2 rolling summary), and gate-confidence that actually gates CC's autonomy. Needs a scheduler and the shim/bus.

gates: proof gate (tester) — IOU: tester not built. Interim proof (proofs/PROOF.md): the projection round-trips a real record (write in CairnCommons/learning/records/ -> recalled by gate here), and its output is verifiably the fold of the records by inspection. Durability gate (code-seam): not done until tested AND committed.
falsifier: the compiled view diverges from the hand-fold of records/ (a record present but not surfaced under its gate, or a ceiling record shown as open). Wrong-shape signal (inherited): if structuring records to stay foldable makes capture stop, simplify — sparse-but-real beats rich-but-empty.
traces_to: Law 5 (intent + code + proofs share an address)
owner: CC gates writes to the mechanism; the learning intent is Akien's ratified I-learns-its-gates.
proof: hand-run recorded in proofs/PROOF.md: `python3 gate_view.py` renders all gates; `python3 gate_view.py <gate>` renders one; both match the records in CairnCommons/learning/records/ by inspection.
provenance: born 2026-07-17 in the horizon-of-awareness design session, answering Akien's 'how would we cast this into code?' — built as the first provable rung, prove-as-you-go. Sibling data store cast 2026-07-16 (ticket cc-learning-store).
